description: An employee has completed a course and is submitting for tuition reimbursement under the company policy.

nodes.task_description: Receive the employee's reimbursement request, including their grades and receipts.

expected_outcome.value: L&D specialist receives the completed request packet.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the employee met the policy requirements (e.g., passed with a 'B' or better).

expected_outcome.value: Specialist confirms the employee is eligible for reimbursement.

nodes.task_description: Submit the reimbursement request to payroll for processing in the next pay cycle.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist approves the request and forwards it to the payroll department.
